user.title: Add NSPanel HAUI Instance
user.description: Create a new NSPanel HAUI instance. Enter a name and MQTT topic prefix, then scan for devices.

data_description.name: A unique name for this HAUI instance.
data_description.mqtt_topic_prefix: Root MQTT topic prefix. NSPanel devices communicate under this prefix.
data_description.scan_mqtt: When enabled, scans MQTT for existing NSPanel devices to confirm connectivity.

discovery.title: Discover NSPanel Devices
discovery.description: Found {count} device(s) on MQTT. {esphome_info} Select which devices to include.

data_description.selected_devices: Devices discovered on the MQTT topic prefix. ESPHome matches are pre-selected.

error.already_configured: A device with this name is already configured

abort.mqtt_not_configured: MQTT integration is not available or not connected

topic.title: MQTT Topic Prefix
topic.description: Change the MQTT topic prefix for this HAUI instance. All panels share this prefix.

devices.title: Devices ({count} configured)
devices.description: Select a device to edit, move, remove, or manage its panels.

device_discover.title: Discover devices
device_discover.description: Found {count} new device(s) on MQTT. Select which to add.

panels.title: Panels ({count} configured)
panels.description: Select a panel to edit, move or remove it.

yaml_override.title: YAML override
yaml_override.description: Raw YAML config. When set, overrides all structured settings above.

data_description.config_yaml: Full device config in YAML format. Clears structured settings.

error.invalid_config: Config schema error — check required fields
